label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Partnership in Jurisdiction of Organization)
rationale: Foreign LP name in home jurisdiction (top-of-form widget directly under the form title; same convention as MLLC-12, MLPA-12A).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The fictitious name, if any, of the limited partnership under which the limited partnership applied for authority to transact business in this State because its real name was not available is
rationale: Fictitious name used in Maine when the home name was unavailable (per 31 MRSA §1508). Same key as FICT-4, MLLC-12.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The jurisdiction of its organization is
SECOND: The date of organization is
rationale: Date of organization in home jurisdiction.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The date on which it was authorized to transact business in the State of Maine is
rationale: Date the foreign LP was originally authorized in Maine.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The street and mailing address of the foreign limited partnership's principal office is: (physical location - street (not P.O. Box), city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical address of principal office (single-line; not P.O. Box).

label_verbatim: (mailing address if different from above) [principal office]
rationale: Optional mailing address of principal office.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The street and mailing address of the foreign limited partnership's required* office is: (physical location - street (not P.O. Box), city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical address of the required office in the home jurisdiction (only applicable if home jurisdiction's laws require maintaining such an office; the asterisk footnote on page 1 clarifies).

label_verbatim: (mailing address if different from above) [required office]
rationale: Optional mailing address of required office.
Date the cancellation notice was signed.
Printed name of the individual GP signer (per-officer signer pattern; only one inline slot since §1324.1.M requires only one GP signature). Same shape as MLPA-12A, MLPA-13A, MLPA-17.

label_verbatim: For General Partner(s) which are Entities: Name of Entity
rationale: Name of an entity GP signer (alternative to individual signer).

rationale: Printed name + capacity of authorized signer for the entity GP.
